title: Zombie Dinner Party
description: This summer, you are what you eat. Blood, guts, dinner.
altHero: group of zombies, one has a grip on a guy’s arm
alt1: zombie is biting the guy’s arm, blood dripping
alt3: a zombie has pulled his intestines out of his gut
alt4: a cop in a breakroom, zombie arms bursting through the wall holding eating utensils
